programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren hunt with Joe Rogan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Spring Break: Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: Capítulo 54
programme.desc: Miguel asks both Roberta and Diego to stay in the band. Mia has to go to the show with Miguel. Alma brings Marcelino and Lupita's little sister, Dulce, to visit Roberta and Lupita at school.

programme.title: Capítulo 55
programme.desc: Pascual agrees to start a foundation with the real purpose to launder money. Roberta pretends to be with Diego in front of León.

programme.title: Capítulo 56
programme.desc: Miguel's mother gets upset when she learns about him attending Elite Way School. In fear of The Lodge, Vico breaks up with Miguel. Franco and Miguel's mother meet each other.

programme.title: Capítulo 57
programme.desc: Franco invites Miguel and his family to celebrate Christmas at his house. Miguel's mother is confused at why Miguel is going back to high school.

programme.title: Capítulo 58
programme.desc: Mia confronts her father asking for the reason he never talks about her mother. Miguel and his mother argue; he reveals his plan to avenge his father's death against Franco.

programme.title: Capítulo 59
programme.desc: Franco sends Alma a message saying he won't be intimidated. Esteban destroys José Lujan's homework. Only the boys are allowed to be in the dance contest.

programme.title: Capítulo 60
programme.desc: Nico's dad is sick and in the hospital. The guys from the band decide to give Nico the money from their first singing gig to help. Miguel also asks Franco for a loan to help Nico and his family.

programme.title: Capítulo 61
programme.desc: Pascual wants Roberta to apologize to Hilda but Alma comes to put the teacher straight before it can happen. Roberta invites Teo and José Lujan to her house for Christmas.

programme.title: Capítulo 62
programme.desc: Mia doesn't want Miguel to have the check her father has given her to give to him. Roberta gets mad at Mia for thinking Miguel lied about Nico's dad.

programme.title: Capítulo 63
programme.desc: Roberta gets revenge on Mia by making Mia think he father died. Joaquín offers Tomás work running drugs. Mia and Roberta have a legitimate boxing match.

programme.title: Carrera de perros
programme.desc: Ludoviquito agrees to a bet with a classmate for a dog race; The one who loses will go out in his underwear with his whole family.

programme.title: Regresen a mis hijos
programme.desc: Ludoviquito, Bibi y Junior son llevados a un orfanato por problemas familiares entre Ludovico y Federica. Sin embargo, las monjas del recinto los devuelven; debido a que no los toleran.

programme.title: Vamos al cine
programme.desc: Los P. Luche van a pasar un rato de ocio en el cine tras insistencias de Federica. Ya en la sala de cine, las personas tienen que lidiar con la familia hablando durante la función, algo que incomoda a Bibi y despierta la reacción del público contra ella.

programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: La feria del pueblo
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: De lo perdido, lo que aparezca
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: El hijo pródigo
programme.desc: A Mexican television series that centers on the López household.

programme.title: Sed de agua
programme.desc: Doña Lucha aprovecha el corte de agua en la colonia para vender unas cubetas que tenía apartadas. María se pone celosa de la nueva ayudante del equipo de futbol, Citlali, mientras que Albertano se la pasa en la banca por ser mal jugador.

programme.title: Patadas de ahogada
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Albertano y doña Lucha le organiza una fiesta, María se pinta el cabello y se pone su más lindo vestido para recuperar a Albertano, le dedica canciones compuestas por ella y le recita un poema. Doña Lucha se siente mal.

programme.title: Bibi maneja
programme.desc: Bibi quiere aprender a conducir, lo que a los P. Luche les parece una excelente idea, solo para que Bibi se convierta en su chofer. Sin embargo, cuando llevan esto al extremo, Bibi sufre un pequeño accidente.

programme.title: El funeral del Merengues
programme.desc: En el velorio de Merengueti, un empleado de Industrias Camerino, Ludovico se da cuenta de que el cadáver tiene el reloj que perdió en la mañana e intenta quitárselo.

programme.title: Casillas vs. Doble 30
programme.desc: Aurelio shows balls with 30-30 and gets product. Felina's en route to Antioquia. Tony's sicarios hit Nazareno. Ingeniero cautions Ismael of Tony. Tata seeks medical advice. Victor pleads forgiveness from Rutilla and Ms. Dona Alba.

programme.title: El escudo ante la guerra
programme.desc: Ismael calls his Dad with bad news. Felina deals with her ex Raimundo El Duro Cabrera. Tony teams with the Russians. The Club opens. Monica scraps with Baby Girl. Alba has Victor call Aurelio with a truce. Aurelio agrees to meet him.

programme.title: Siniestro en el antro
programme.desc: Aurelio meets Felina's ghost. Tony, Ruben and the Russians light up the Wolf Den. Monica escapes and frees Ramon but must now escape the fire. Omar invites Jaime to dinner so he can fulfill his promise. Esperanza says too much.

programme.title: Conexion presidencial
programme.desc: Victor saves Monica. Ruti is arrested by Rivero. Esperanza calls her parents. Felina provides Aurelio with merch, money, and connections in Spain with one condition. Omar and Rodrigo spat. Tony calls a meeting with Victor.

programme.title: La jugada de Teran
programme.desc: Ismael sets to getting Rutila out of jail. Tony kills the Russians as a fake token to Victor. Victor releases Monica and her merch. Rivero and Garcia bait Teran but he turns the table and fires him. He appoints Castillo Head of Defense.

programme.title: Los Casillas frente a frente
programme.desc: Pilar finds trouble. Victor and Aurelio make peace. Victor cleans his business. Aurelio offers Victor work. Paloma goes to Cancun. Monica sets up a meeting with Castrata. Aurelio challenges Monica over her partner. Aurelio is out for blood.

programme.title: Cita sangrienta
programme.desc: Aurelio tells the family of Monica's dealings. Swears revenge to Carmen. Omar denies Rivero's request. Victor enjoys BabyGirl and peace. Tata receives bad news. Victor's meeting with Tony proves fatal. Skinny and BabyGirl narrowly escape.

programme.title: El plan inesperado
programme.desc: Salazar and Colon are on a stakeout in Haiti. Felina remembers the men in her life. Ruti calls out Sebas coke usage. Tony hires Filemon. BabyGirl kills Ruben. Rodrigo helps Garcia escape. Pilar meets the distributor in Europe.

programme.title: El punto debil
programme.desc: Salvatierra's meet Rivero. Monica visits Isidro and talks finance with Rutila. Pastrana's Chicago trip doesn't go well and Colon is onto him. Skinny learns the location of 30-30s shipment to Monica. Victor takes Monica by surprise.

programme.title: El imperio de Casillas
programme.desc: Aurelio admits fault to Dalvio. As does Jorge to Esperanza. Zoe isn't fooled by Salazar. Victor foils Monica's drop and sabotages the Pastrana deal. Colon ask Rivero to bug Tata's IP address. Omar joins Jaime and asks him to seduce Paloma.

programme.title: Un remolino de poder
programme.desc: Colon questions Jorge. Monica needs to escape from Victor's imprisonment. Ruti rightly accuses her father. Pastrana targets Casillases and nabs Arelis. Penumbre strong-arms Super Javi unaware of his benefactor. Monica rips Victor's ethics.

programme.title: Episode #1.90
programme.desc: Juana toma su última medicina. Antonio se despide de Hipólita. Juana deja carta a Luis y al regidor. Modesta confiesa. El conde Luis se casa con Hipólita. Marcos ofrece matrimonio a Perla. La independencia llega.

programme.title: Ya valió barriga
programme.desc: Un nuevo inquilino llega al departamento, su nombre es: Hipólito Menchaca y tiene un gran parecido con el famoso actor Édgar Vivar. Los vecinos quieren quedar bien con él.

programme.title: La jefa del Rocko
programme.desc: La mamá de Rocko viene a conocer a su nieto Morris y tiene la intención de llevarlo a vivir con ella y darle la vida que se merece. Liz se vuelve representante de Benito y le consigue un papel en una película.

programme.title: Conserjerito inglés
programme.desc: Germán y compañía toman clases de inglés en línea con Silvia. Cuando Miss Silvia reprueba a Germán, este descubre la forma de desquitarse. Rocko tiene problemas de oído y creen que se está quedando sordo.

programme.title: La toalla del mojado 2
programme.desc: Frankie recibe una visita inesperada, la famosa actriz Lyn May, quien lo inspira a que haga la película de La toalla del mojado 2. Pedro se encarga de cuidar a Luisito Jr. para que Luis pueda descansar.

programme.title: La veterinaria de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa por fin cumple el sueño de tener su propia veterinaria y, con ayuda de su novio Fabián, renta el local que está en el edificio. Los López Pérez compran una lavadora nueva y la colocan en el pasillo frente al departamento de Luis.

programme.title: ¡Qué escándalo!
programme.desc: Morris aprende a tocar la batería y los vecinos se quejan por el ruido. Silvia y Luis descubren que ese ruido arrulla al bebé.

programme.title: Arturo influencer
programme.desc: Arturo se vuelve un famoso influencer de TikTok y Paco de Miguel lo busca para una colaboración. Cris recibe la visita de su hermana Esmeralda y Pedro se siente desplazado.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Bebé a bordo
programme.desc: En el segundo día del diplomado de Silvia, Luisito Jr. queda al cuidado de Pedrito, pero este permite que todos los vecinos lo cuiden y en un descuido pierden al bebé.

programme.title: Atorón
programme.desc: Es el aniversario de Benito y de Liz, pero él no tiene dinero para festejarlo, por lo que ella le pone un ultimátum para continuar con su relación. Luis y Magda discuten porque ambos quieren usar las escaleras.

programme.title: Primera palabra
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: El bautizo
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento? Benito abandona la vecindad por siempre.

programme.title: No se vende
programme.desc: La dueña del edificio falleció y sus dos hijas, 'Maty' y 'Mony' se lo disputan, dejando en medio a los vecinos y a punto de ser desalojados.

programme.title: Regresó Ale
programme.desc: Ale regresa a casa con su familia. Descubre cuál será su reacción al verla de nuevo. Además, Benito gana una audición para una serie.

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Capitán raquetas
programme.desc: Luis está en problemas, ya que deberá armar un plan para evitar que lo echen de su trabajo. Además, doña Magda se actualiza en la moda y se pone uñas nuevas.

programme.title: Guerra de las albóndigas
programme.desc: Lorena y Liz se pelean para saber quién de las dos prepara las mejores albóndigas enchipotladas. Además, Roco recibe la visita de su madre.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Fixin' to Stop
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: Intruder Alert
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: Pass the Buck
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: Baby on the Way
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man's erratic behavior.

programme.title: Carside Confessions
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: Out-of-Towner
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: Pit Stop
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: No Good, Very Bad Day
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon's true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: Palms Are Sweaty
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other's actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: Gate Crusher Pursuit
programme.desc: A high-stakes car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates in Las Vegas. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A routine traffic stop proves there's always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can't out pedal police horsepower. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 unit discovers hidden contraband on a suspect's most private places.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A vehicle is pulled over for a simple seat belt violation and ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in a stolen car. Officers find drugs abound in a tough part of town.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies and dogs attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning but plenty of warrants.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Missing Pistol Pursuit
programme.desc: Stop sticks are used to intercept a vehicle with more bullets than the local shooting range. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found dope sick with meth, heroin, and shattered dreams.

programme.title: Puppy Luck
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Hauling a Heater
programme.desc: Lies can't hide the truth when a stolen U-Haul is seized during a felony traffic stop. A suspect with his pants down has no hiding places for his alleged meth pipe.

programme.title: 2 Flats Don't Make a Right
programme.desc: A suspect forgets to drive away after breaking into a used car lot. A dispute over money ends in felony vandalism. The truth can be fleeting when suspects are found with narcotics and tall tales.
